mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UB_PAY ( pay_id, matching_number, pay_amount, pay_method, pay_date, pay_status, member_number ) VALUES ( SEQ_PAY.NEXTVAL, #{matchingNumber}, #{payAmount}, '카카오페이', SYSDATE, 'SUCCESS', #{memberNumber} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT PAY_ID, MATCHING_NUMBER, PAY_AMOUNT, PAY_METHOD, PAY_DATE, PAY_STATUS, MEMBER_NUMBER FROM UB_PAY WHERE MEMBER_NUMBER = #{memberNumber} ORDER BY PAY_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
